stage.subtitle_ar: عميلك هو رأس مالك — هنا تتعلّم كيف تستقبله، وتشرح له الإصلاح والتكلفة، وتكسب رضاه بالإنجليزية.

content.intro_ar: العميل الذي يشعر بالترحيب يعود مرة أخرى — وهذه قاعدة تعرفها في عملك جيدًا. في هذا الدرس ستتعلم كيف تستقبل عميلك بالإنجليزية من أول ثانية: التحية، والسؤال عن حاجته، وتنظيم الموعد. جمل قصيرة وبسيطة، لكنها تصنع انطباعًا يبقى.

vocab.meaning_en: a person who buys a product or service
vocab.example: The customer is waiting at the counter.

vocab.meaning_en: a friendly greeting when someone arrives
vocab.example: Welcome to our workshop!

vocab.meaning_en: to say hello in a friendly way
vocab.example: I greet every customer with a smile.

vocab.meaning_en: a fixed time to meet or get a service
vocab.example: Your appointment is at nine o'clock.

vocab.meaning_en: the desk where you serve customers
vocab.example: Please pay at the counter.

vocab.meaning_en: to do something useful for someone
vocab.example: How can I help you today?

vocab.meaning_en: to stay until something happens
vocab.example: Please wait five minutes.

vocab.meaning_en: finished and prepared
vocab.example: Your car is ready now.

vocab.meaning_en: kind and respectful
vocab.example: Our team is always polite.

vocab.meaning_en: a happy look on your face
vocab.example: A smile makes customers feel welcome.

vocab.meaning_en: the time when someone comes to a place
vocab.example: Thank you for your visit.

reading.title_en: A Good Morning at the Workshop
paragraphs: Dhafer opens his workshop at eight o'clock. The first customer of the day is at the counter. Dhafer smiles and says, "Good morning! Welcome to our workshop. How can I help you?" A warm welcome is the start of good service.

The customer has an appointment for an oil change. Dhafer checks the name and the phone number in his book. "Yes, Mr. Salem, your appointment is at 8:15. Please wait here. We have coffee and water." The customer sits and waits. He is happy because the place is clean and the team is polite.

A second customer comes without an appointment. Dhafer greets him too. "Welcome! Today we are busy, but we can see your car at eleven o'clock." The man agrees. Dhafer writes his name and phone number and says, "Your car will be ready at one o'clock."
At the end of the visit, Dhafer gives the keys back with a smile. "Thank you for your visit. See you next time!" Happy customers come back, and they tell their friends about the good service.

key_phrases.en: Good morning! Welcome to our workshop.
key_phrases.ar: صباح الخير! أهلًا بك في ورشتنا.

key_phrases.en: How can I help you today?
Please have a seat. It will take ten minutes.
key_phrases.ar: تفضّل بالجلوس. سيستغرق الأمر عشر دقائق.

key_phrases.en: Your car will be ready at five o'clock.
Thank you for your visit. See you next time!
key_phrases.ar: شكرًا لزيارتك. نراك في المرة القادمة!

comprehension.question: What is the first thing Dhafer does when a customer arrives?
options: He greets the customer with a smile
He asks the customer to leave
comprehension.correct: He greets the customer with a smile
comprehension.explanation_ar: الترحيب بالعميل بابتسامة هو أول خطوة في الخدمة الجيدة، كما في بداية القراءة.

comprehension.question: Why does the first customer come to the workshop?
options: He has an appointment for an oil change
He wants to buy a new car
He wants to work at the workshop
comprehension.correct: He has an appointment for an oil change
comprehension.explanation_ar: النص يذكر أن العميل الأول لديه موعد لتغيير الزيت.

comprehension.question: What does Dhafer offer customers while they wait?
comprehension.explanation_ar: ظافر يقول للعميل: انتظر هنا، لدينا قهوة وماء.

comprehension.question: The second customer has no appointment. What does Dhafer do?
options: He tells him to go to another workshop
He gives him a time at eleven o'clock
He asks him to come next week
comprehension.correct: He gives him a time at eleven o'clock
comprehension.explanation_ar: الورشة مشغولة، لكن ظافر لا يرفض العميل — بل يعطيه موعدًا في الساعة الحادية عشرة.

comprehension.question: What does the word "polite" mean?
comprehension.explanation_ar: كلمة polite تعني مهذّبًا — لطيفًا ومحترمًا في التعامل.

task.prompt_en: A customer walks into your workshop at 8 a.m. Greet him, ask how you can help, and tell him when his car will be ready. Speak for 30–60 seconds.
task.prompt_ar: عميل يدخل ورشتك الساعة الثامنة صباحًا. رحّب به، واسأله كيف تساعده، وأخبره متى ستكون سيارته جاهزة. تحدّث لمدة ٣٠–٦٠ ثانية.
task.guidance_ar: ابدأ بتحية واضحة، واستخدم ٣ كلمات على الأقل من كلمات الدرس.

content.intro_ar: شرح الإصلاح والتكلفة بوضوح هو الفرق بين عميل متردد وعميل يوافق بثقة. في هذا الدرس ستتعلم كيف تشرح نتيجة الفحص بالإنجليزية، وتقدّم عرض السعر (قطع الغيار وأجرة العمل)، وتعرض الخيارات والضمان. تحدّث بلغة بسيطة، ودَع الوضوح يبيع عنك.

vocab.meaning_en: the work of fixing something broken
vocab.example: The repair will take two hours.

vocab.meaning_en: a careful check of something
vocab.example: We start with a full inspection.

vocab.meaning_en: a calculation of what something will cost
vocab.example: I will send you the estimate before we start.

vocab.meaning_en: a piece used to replace a broken one
vocab.example: This spare part is original.

vocab.meaning_en: the cost of the work people do
vocab.example: The price includes parts and labor.

vocab.meaning_en: to change something old for a new one
vocab.example: We need to replace the battery.

vocab.meaning_en: the parts that press to stop the car
vocab.example: Your brake pads are worn.

vocab.meaning_en: a promise to fix or replace a product
vocab.example: The part has a one-year warranty.

vocab.meaning_en: saying yes to a plan or a price
vocab.example: We wait for your approval before any repair.

vocab.meaning_en: to say that something is a good choice
vocab.example: I recommend the original parts.

vocab.meaning_en: the full amount after adding everything
vocab.example: The total is 650 riyals.

vocab.meaning_en: one of the things you can choose
vocab.example: You have two options for the parts.

reading.title_ar: عرض السعر: كيف تشرح الإصلاح بوضوح
paragraphs: When a car arrives at the workshop, the first step is a careful inspection. The technician checks the engine, the brakes, and the tires. After the inspection, Dhafer calls the customer to explain the problem in simple words. He never uses difficult technical language, because a customer who understands is a customer who trusts.

Today, the problem is the brake pads. They are worn and must be replaced. Dhafer prepares an estimate: the spare parts cost 450 riyals, and the labor costs 200 riyals. The total is 650 riyals. He also gives the customer two options: original parts with a one-year warranty, or cheaper parts with a six-month warranty.

Dhafer explains why he recommends the original parts: "They last longer, and the warranty protects you." Then he waits for the customer's approval. This is an important rule in his workshop — no repair starts before the customer approves the estimate. When the customer says yes, the team starts the work immediately.

At the end, Dhafer sends a message with the final cost and a photo of the old parts. Customers love this, because they can see what was replaced. A clear estimate, honest options, and a real warranty — this is how a small workshop builds a big name.

key_phrases.en: After the inspection, we found a problem with the brakes.
key_phrases.ar: بعد الفحص، وجدنا مشكلة في الفرامل.

key_phrases.en: The total estimate is 650 riyals — parts and labor.
key_phrases.ar: إجمالي عرض السعر ٦٥٠ ريالًا — القطع وأجرة العمل.

key_phrases.en: I recommend replacing the brake pads today.
We will not start any repair before your approval.
key_phrases.ar: لن نبدأ أي إصلاح قبل موافقتك.

key_phrases.en: You have two options: original parts or cheaper ones.
key_phrases.ar: أمامك خياران: قطع أصلية أو قطع أرخص.

key_phrases.en: The new part comes with a one-year warranty.
key_phrases.ar: القطعة الجديدة معها ضمان لمدة سنة.

comprehension.question: What is the first step when a car arrives at the workshop?
comprehension.explanation_ar: النص يقول إن أول خطوة عند وصول السيارة هي الفحص الدقيق.

comprehension.question: How much is the total estimate for the brake repair?
comprehension.explanation_ar: القطع ٤٥٠ ريالًا وأجرة العمل ٢٠٠ ريال، فالإجمالي ٦٥٠ ريالًا.

comprehension.question: Why does Dhafer recommend the original parts?
options: They last longer and the warranty protects the customer
They are cheaper than other parts
They arrive faster from the supplier
comprehension.correct: They last longer and the warranty protects the customer
comprehension.explanation_ar: ظافر يشرح أن القطع الأصلية تدوم أطول والضمان يحمي العميل.

comprehension.question: When does the team start the repair?
options: As soon as the car arrives
At the end of the day
After the customer approves the estimate
comprehension.correct: After the customer approves the estimate
comprehension.explanation_ar: القاعدة في الورشة: لا يبدأ أي إصلاح قبل موافقة العميل على عرض السعر.

comprehension.question: What does "labor" mean in an estimate?
options: The price of the spare parts
The cost of the work done by the team
comprehension.correct: The cost of the work done by the team
comprehension.explanation_ar: كلمة labor في عرض السعر تعني أجرة العمل — تكلفة الجهد الذي يبذله الفريق.

task.prompt_en: Write 4–5 sentences explaining a repair estimate to a customer: the problem, the cost of parts and labor, and the warranty.
task.prompt_ar: اكتب ٤–٥ جُمل تشرح فيها عرض سعر لإصلاح: المشكلة، وتكلفة القطع وأجرة العمل، والضمان.
task.guidance_ar: اذكر السعر بالريال، واستخدم ٤ كلمات على الأقل من كلمات الدرس.

content.intro_ar: الشكوى ليست نهاية العلاقة مع العميل — بل فرصة لكسب ثقته إذا تعاملت معها باحتراف. في هذا الدرس ستتعلم كيف تستمع بهدوء، وتعتذر بشكل صحيح، وتقدّم حلًا عمليًا بالإنجليزية. هذه المهارة وحدها تحمي سمعة عملك.

vocab.meaning_en: when a customer says something is wrong
vocab.example: We take every complaint seriously.

vocab.meaning_en: unhappy or angry about something
vocab.example: The customer was upset about the delay.

vocab.meaning_en: relaxed, not angry or nervous
vocab.example: Stay calm and listen first.

vocab.meaning_en: to say you are sorry
vocab.example: I apologize for the mistake.

vocab.meaning_en: something done wrong
vocab.example: It was our mistake, and we will fix it.

vocab.meaning_en: a way to fix a problem
vocab.example: We found a quick solution.

vocab.meaning_en: to say you will give or do something
vocab.example: We offer a free check this week.

vocab.meaning_en: money given back to the customer
vocab.example: He asked for a full refund.

vocab.meaning_en: to say you will surely do something
vocab.example: I promise it will be ready today.

vocab.meaning_en: happy with a service or product
vocab.example: The customer left satisfied.

vocab.meaning_en: believing that someone is honest
vocab.example: Good service builds trust.

vocab.meaning_en: to check again after a service
vocab.example: I always follow up after a big repair.

reading.title_en: Turning an Angry Customer into a Loyal One
reading.title_ar: كيف تحوّل عميلًا غاضبًا إلى عميل دائم
paragraphs: Last Thursday, a customer came back to the workshop very upset. His air conditioner had stopped working again, only one week after the repair. He spoke loudly in front of other customers. Dhafer stayed calm. He knows that the first minutes of a complaint are the most important.

First, he listened without interrupting. Then he apologized clearly: "I am sorry about this. You are right to be upset." He did not blame the customer or make excuses. A mistake had happened in the workshop, and he accepted it. Saying sorry does not make you weak — it shows the customer that you respect him.

Next, Dhafer offered a fast solution: "We will check the car now, and we will fix the problem today, free of charge." He also offered the customer a ride home, so he did not have to wait. Two hours later, the problem was fixed, and the team had found the real cause — a small electrical fault the first repair had missed.

The next day, Dhafer called the customer to follow up: "Is the air conditioner working well?" The customer was surprised and satisfied. He did not ask for a refund; instead, he promised to come back. A complaint that is handled well can build more trust than a normal visit. Angry customers do not want a fight — they want someone who listens and keeps his promise.

key_phrases.en: I am sorry about this. Let me check it right away.
key_phrases.ar: أعتذر عن هذا. دعني أفحصها فورًا.

key_phrases.en: I understand why you are upset.
We will fix it today, free of charge.
Thank you for telling us about the problem.
If anything happens again, call me directly.
key_phrases.ar: إذا تكرّر أي شيء، اتصل بي مباشرة.

key_phrases.en: Your trust is important to us.

comprehension.question: Why was the customer upset?
options: Dhafer did not answer his call
His air conditioner stopped working again after the repair
comprehension.correct: His air conditioner stopped working again after the repair
comprehension.explanation_ar: المكيّف توقف عن العمل مرة أخرى بعد أسبوع واحد فقط من الإصلاح.

comprehension.question: What did Dhafer do first when he heard the complaint?
comprehension.explanation_ar: الخطوة الأولى في التعامل مع الشكوى: الاستماع الكامل دون مقاطعة.

comprehension.question: What solution did Dhafer offer?
options: A discount on a new car
A refund of half the price
Fixing the problem the same day, free of charge
comprehension.correct: Fixing the problem the same day, free of charge
comprehension.explanation_ar: عرض ظافر إصلاح المشكلة في اليوم نفسه وبدون أي تكلفة على العميل.

comprehension.question: What did Dhafer do the next day?
options: He called the customer to follow up
comprehension.correct: He called the customer to follow up
comprehension.explanation_ar: اتصل ظافر بالعميل في اليوم التالي ليتابع ويطمئن أن المكيّف يعمل جيدًا.

comprehension.question: What does the reading say about complaints?
options: A complaint always means losing the customer
Customers who complain want a refund only
A complaint handled well can build more trust
It is better to ignore complaints
comprehension.correct: A complaint handled well can build more trust
comprehension.explanation_ar: الشكوى التي تُعالج باحتراف قد تبني ثقة أكبر من زيارة عادية.

task.prompt_en: An upset customer says: "My car has the same problem again!" Respond: apologize, offer a solution, and promise to follow up. Speak for 45–60 seconds.
task.prompt_ar: عميل منزعج يقول لك: «سيارتي فيها نفس المشكلة مرة ثانية!». رُدّ عليه: اعتذر، واعرض حلًا، وعِده بالمتابعة. تحدّث لمدة ٤٥–٦٠ ثانية.
task.guidance_ar: ابدأ بالاعتذار، وحافظ على نبرة هادئة، واستخدم ٣ كلمات على الأقل من كلمات الدرس.
